query:
INSERT INTO performers (name, performerType, imageUrl, bio) VALUES
('Nicole Aniston', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/NvbadFglByspdFIi.png', 'Stunning blonde bombshell with classic beauty and signature style. Industry legend.'),
('Phoenix Marie', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/WQJkbAmATBzRLpsy.png', 'Athletic powerhouse known for intense performances and extreme dedication.'),
('Kagney Linn Karter', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/ReDvmcLousfJrKTg.png', 'Blonde performer with unique style and specialist approach to her craft.'),
('Tori Black', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/vesBhwBKdlMmFYCI.png', 'Multiple award winner and Hall of Fame inductee. Industry icon.'),
('Jada Stevens', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/yMHvkKEvvxGbkLfJ.png', 'Signature performer with specialist talents and legendary status.')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
imageUrl = VALUES(imageUrl),
performerType = VALUES(performerType),
bio = VALUES(bio);
command:
